title: Op Spec
description: Backend-agnostic operation contract. Defined ONCE per logical operation; every Implementation Card (any backend) must satisfy it. See docs/library.md §2.1.

id.description: Stable identifier, '<name>@<semver>'. The canonical handle cards reference via `implements`.

kernel.description: The xkernels dispatch key (the name passed to dispatch/select_backend), e.g. 'ffn', 'dual_rmsnorm'. Lets an Impl Card resolve to a callable via (kernel, backend).

signature.description: Short math signature, e.g. 'rmsnorm(x) @ w  (fused epilogue)'.

canonical_op.description: Canonical op family; the primary retrieval key.

inputs.description: Map of argument name -> tensor contract. Ordered to match the dispatch signature.

constraints.description: Decidable-from-shape/dtype-only predicates. Each must be expressible in the predicate mini-language (see $defs/predicate).

preconditions.description: Runtime invariants the caller guarantees (e.g. 'x is contiguous'). Not statically checked, but declared.

reference.description: Import path of the backend-neutral reference callable, e.g. 'xkernels.ops.ffn.reference:ffn_reference'. Never a CUDA/HIP impl.

rtol.description: Relative tolerance vs the reference for a single backend.

cross_backend_rtol.description: Max allowed pairwise relative error between two backends. Required when >=2 cards exist; defaults to rtol.

by_dtype.description: Optional per-dtype tolerance refinements (short dtype name -> {rtol, atol}). When present, the verifier uses these for the matching dtype and falls back to the top-level rtol/atol otherwise. Keeps tolerance defined once, centrally, while staying honest across dtypes.

shape_sweep.description: Id of the mandatory correctness sweep manifest under registry/shape_sweeps/, e.g. 'ffn'.

composes_with.description: Op ids this op composes with (reasoned at the op level).

provenance.description: Optional source-of-truth metadata. VKL-authored specs set authored_by='dsl' and source_path='xkernels.vkl:<kernel>'.

source_path.description: Repo-relative source path or source handle that generated this Op Spec.

shape_symbols.description: Symbolic dims, e.g. ['M','K'] or ['T','d1']. Symbols may carry divisibility in constraints.

contiguous.description: Whether the arg must be contiguous (default false).

constraint.description: A decidable predicate. Supported syntax (see xkernels.registry.constraints.evaluate): comparisons (==, !=, <, <=, >, >=, %), boolean and/or, and shape/dtype bindings like 'K % 8 == 0' or "dtype(x) == 'bf16'".
